README still used orchestration/GitHub workflow enforcement language.
Compliance rule IDs still conflict between JSON and Markdown surfaces; FAE-C011/C012 missing.

failed_p1_findings: GitHub workflows remain core enforcement and hard-code policy.
Contributor guard still rejects prohibited source-line language and requires human authorship only.
Path and documentation policies still reference stale paths.
No Apple, Windows, or generic overlays are present.
Remediation is not reflected accurately in version/changelog evidence.

validator_results.observed_output_summary: Reported 57 errors, including many present repository files as missing, invalid JSON at A:\Workspace\package-lock.json, and labels sync missing. The script appears to compute the repository root as A:\Workspace instead of the cloned repository.
Windows Subsystem for Linux has no installed distributions.
